raw_text: {"intent":"Extract and store durable preference memories from the provided table.","decision":"Accept the table as a source of two preference facts and create two memory cards with low ambiguity.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"Sam prefers Bill Evans.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Bill Evans","type":"person","role":"preference object"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"prefers","object":"Bill Evans"}]},{"kind":"preference","statement":"Daniele prefers knowledge graphs.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Daniele","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"knowledge graphs","type":"concept","role":"preference object"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Daniele","predicate":"prefers","object":"knowledge graphs"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"create","entity_id":null,"reason":"The table introduces two distinct people and two distinct preferences; no prior entity context is provided for resolution."},"conflict_classification":"no_conflict","answer":"Stored two preference memories: Sam → Bill Evans; Daniele → knowledge graphs.","citations":["| Sam | Bill Evans |","| Daniele | Knowledge graphs |"],"repair_options":["If needed, normalize \"Knowledge graphs\" to lowercase as \"knowledge graphs\" while preserving meaning.","If a specific Sam or Daniele is already known in memory, merge only if identifiers match."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Created memory card for Sam's preference.","Created memory card for Daniele's preference."]}}
